tEn: Guiding a Diffusion Model with a Bad Version of Itself
tZh: 用自身的一个劣化版本来引导扩散模型
sEn: Guiding a diffusion model with a smaller, less-trained version of itself yields disentangled control over image quality without reducing variation, achieving record FID scores on ImageNet.
sZh: 用模型自身的一个更小、训练更少的版本来引导生成，可以在不减少多样性的情况下独立控制图像质量，在ImageNet上取得了创纪录的FID分数。
absEn: The primary axes of interest in image-generating diffusion models are image quality, the amount of variation in the results, and how well the results align with a given condition, e.g., a class label or a text prompt. The popular classifier-free guidance approach uses an unconditional model to guide a conditional model, leading to simultaneously better prompt alignment and higher-quality images at the cost of reduced variation. These effects seem inherently entangled, and thus hard to control. We make the surprising observation that it is possible to obtain disentangled control over image quality without compromising the amount of variation by guiding generation using a smaller, less-trained version of the model itself rather than an unconditional model. This leads to significant improvements in ImageNet generation, setting record FIDs of 1.01 for 64x64 and 1.25 for 512x512, using publicly available networks. Furthermore, the method is also applicable to unconditional diffusion models, drastically improving their quality.
absZh: 图像生成扩散模型的主要关注点是图像质量、结果多样性以及结果与给定条件（如类别标签或文本提示）的对齐程度。流行的无分类器引导方法使用无条件模型来引导条件模型，从而同时提高提示对齐度和图像质量，但代价是多样性降低。这些效果似乎内在纠缠，难以控制。我们有一个令人惊讶的发现：通过使用模型自身的一个更小、训练更少的版本（而非无条件模型）来引导生成，可以在不牺牲多样性的情况下独立控制图像质量。这显著提升了ImageNet上的生成效果，使用公开可用的网络，在64x64和512x512分辨率上分别创下了1.01和1.25的FID记录。此外，该方法也适用于无条件扩散模型，大幅提升了其质量。

contrib.en: Proposes autoguidance, using a smaller, less-trained version of the model itself to guide generation, achieving disentangled control over image quality without reducing variation.
contrib.zh: 提出自引导方法，使用模型自身更小、训练更少的版本来引导生成，在不减少多样性的情况下实现对图像质量的解耦控制。

contrib.en: Sets new state-of-the-art FID records on ImageNet: 1.01 for 64x64 and 1.25 for 512x512.
contrib.zh: 在ImageNet上创下新的最先进FID记录：64x64为1.01，512x512为1.25。

contrib.en: Identifies that classifier-free guidance improves image quality by implicitly truncating low-probability regions due to quality differences between conditional and unconditional denoisers.
contrib.zh: 发现无分类器引导通过条件与无条件去噪器之间的质量差异，隐式截断低概率区域，从而提升图像质量。

contrib.en: Demonstrates that autoguidance is applicable to unconditional diffusion models, drastically improving their quality (e.g., FID from 11.67 to 3.86 on ImageNet-512).
contrib.zh: 证明自引导可应用于无条件扩散模型，大幅提升其质量（例如ImageNet-512上FID从11.67降至3.86）。

contrib.en: Validates that the guiding model must suffer from compatible degradations (e.g., reduced capacity and training) for effective guidance.
contrib.zh: 验证引导模型必须遭受兼容的退化（如降低容量和训练）才能有效引导。

contrib.en: Shows autoguidance preserves image style and complexity better than classifier-free guidance, and can be combined with it for artistic control.
contrib.zh: 表明自引导比无分类器引导更好地保留图像风格和复杂性，并可与之结合用于艺术控制。

limits.en: Requires a smaller, less-trained version of the same model, which may not be available for existing large-scale generators.
limits.zh: 需要同一模型的更小、训练更少的版本，现有大规模生成器可能无法提供。

limits.en: Effectiveness depends on compatible degradations between main and guiding models; mismatched degradations yield no improvement.
limits.zh: 有效性取决于主模型与引导模型之间的兼容退化；不匹配的退化不会带来改进。

limits.en: Does not provide formal proof of conditions for beneficial autoguidance; relies on empirical observations.
limits.zh: 未提供有益自引导条件的正式证明，依赖经验观察。

limits.en: Potential distribution shifts between training snapshots (e.g., due to data changes) may violate assumptions.
limits.zh: 训练快照之间的潜在分布偏移（例如由于数据变化）可能违反假设。

limits.en: Optimal guiding model selection (e.g., capacity, training steps) requires grid search and may vary across datasets.
limits.zh: 最佳引导模型选择（如容量、训练步数）需要网格搜索，且可能因数据集而异。

items.en: The primary axes of interest in image-generating diffusion models are image quality, the amount of variation in the results, and how well the results align with a given condition, e.g., a class label or a text prompt. The popular classifier-free guidance approach uses an unconditional model to guide a conditional model, leading to simultaneously better prompt alignment and higher-quality images at the cost of reduced variation. These effects seem inherently entangled, and thus hard to control. We make the surprising observation that it is possible to obtain disentangled control over image quality without compromising the amount of variation by guiding generation using a smaller, less-trained version of the model itself rather than an unconditional model. This leads to significant improvements in ImageNet generation, setting record FIDs of 1.01 for 64×64646464{\times}64 and 1.25 for 512×512512512512{\times}512, using publicly available networks. Furthermore, the method is also applicable to unconditional diffusion models, drastically improving their quality.
items.zh: 图像生成扩散模型的主要关注轴是图像质量、结果中的变化量以及结果与给定条件（例如类别标签或文本提示）的对齐程度。流行的无分类器引导方法使用无条件模型来引导条件模型，从而同时实现更好的提示对齐和更高质量的图像，但代价是变化减少。这些效应似乎本质上是纠缠在一起的，因此难以控制。我们有一个令人惊讶的发现：通过使用模型本身的一个更小、训练更少的版本（而不是无条件模型）来引导生成，可以在不牺牲变化量的情况下获得对图像质量的解耦控制。这导致在ImageNet生成中取得了显著改进，使用公开可用的网络，在64×64分辨率上创下了1.01的FID记录，在512×512分辨率上创下了1.25的FID记录。此外，该方法也适用于无条件扩散模型，大幅提升了它们的质量。

items.en: Denoising diffusion models [12, 37, 38, 39, 40] generate synthetic images by reversing a stochastic corruption process. Essentially, an image is revealed from pure noise by denoising it little by little in successive steps. A neural network that implements the denoiser (equivalently [44], the score function [15]) is a central design element, and various architectures have been proposed (e.g., [1, 5, 7, 14, 16, 19, 30]). Equally important are the details of the multi-step denoising process that corresponds mathematically to solving an ordinary [27, 38] or a stochastic [40] differential equation, for which many different parameterizations, solvers, and step schedules have been evaluated [17, 18, 22, 35, 46]. To control the output image, the denoiser is typically conditioned on a class label, an embedding of a text prompt, or some other form of conditioning input [28, 33, 36, 45].
items.zh: 去噪扩散模型[12, 37, 38, 39, 40]通过逆转随机损坏过程来生成合成图像。本质上，图像是从纯噪声中通过逐步去噪而逐渐显现出来的。实现去噪器（等价于[44]中的得分函数[15]）的神经网络是核心设计元素，已经提出了多种架构（例如[1, 5, 7, 14, 16, 19, 30]）。同样重要的是多步去噪过程的细节，这在数学上对应于求解常微分方程[27, 38]或随机微分方程[40]，为此已经评估了许多不同的参数化、求解器和步长调度[17, 18, 22, 35, 46]。为了控制输出图像，去噪器通常以类别标签、文本提示的嵌入或其他形式的条件输入为条件[28, 33, 36, 45]。

items.en: The training objective of a diffusion model aims to cover the entire (conditional) data distribution. This causes problems in low-probability regions: The model gets heavily penalized for not representing them, but it does not have enough data to learn to generate good images corresponding to them. Classifier-free guidance (CFG) [13] has become the standard method for “lowering the sampling temperature”, i.e., focusing the generation on well-learned high-probability regions. By training a denoiser network to operate in both conditional and unconditional setting, the sampling process can be steered away from the unconditional result — in effect, the unconditional generation task specifies a result to avoid. This results in better prompt alignment and improved image quality, where the former effect is due to CFG implicitly raising the conditional part of the probability density to a power greater than one [8].
items.zh: 扩散模型的训练目标旨在覆盖整个（条件）数据分布。这在低概率区域会导致问题：模型因不表示这些区域而受到严重惩罚，但它没有足够的数据来学习生成与之对应的好图像。无分类器引导（CFG）[13]已成为“降低采样温度”的标准方法，即将生成集中在学习良好的高概率区域。通过训练去噪器网络在条件和无条件设置下运行，采样过程可以远离无条件结果——实际上，无条件生成任务指定了一个要避免的结果。这导致更好的提示对齐和改进的图像质量，其中前者效应是由于CFG隐式地将概率密度的条件部分提升到大于1的幂次[8]。

items.en: However, CFG has drawbacks that limit its usage as a general low-temperature sampling method. First, it is applicable only for conditional generation, as the guidance signal is based on the difference between conditional and unconditional denoising results. Second, because the unconditional and conditional denoisers are trained to solve a different task, the sampling trajectory can overshoot the desired conditional distribution, which leads to skewed and often overly simplified image compositions [21]. Finally, the prompt alignment and quality improvement effects cannot be controlled separately, and it remains unclear how exactly they relate to each other.
items.zh: 然而，CFG存在一些缺点，限制了其作为通用低温采样方法的使用。首先，它仅适用于条件生成，因为引导信号基于条件和无条件去噪结果之间的差异。其次，由于无条件去噪器和条件去噪器被训练来解决不同的任务，采样轨迹可能会超出期望的条件分布，导致扭曲且往往过于简化的图像组成[21]。最后，提示对齐和质量改进效应无法单独控制，并且它们之间的确切关系仍不清楚。

items.en: In this paper, we provide new insights into why CFG improves image quality and show how this effect can be separated out into a novel method that we call autoguidance. Our method does not suffer from the task discrepancy problem because we use an inferior version of the main model itself as the guiding model, with unchanged conditioning. This guiding model can be obtained by simply limiting, e.g., model capacity and/or training time. We validate the effectiveness of autoguidance in various synthetic test cases as well as in practical image synthesis in class-conditional and text-conditional settings. In addition, our method enables guidance for unconditional synthesis. In quantitative tests, the generated image distributions are improved considerably when measured using FID [10] and FDDINOv2 [42] metrics, setting new records in ImageNet-512 and ImageNet-64 generation.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们提供了关于CFG为何能提高图像质量的新见解，并展示了如何将这种效应分离出来，形成一种我们称之为自引导的新方法。我们的方法不会受到任务差异问题的影响，因为我们使用主模型本身的劣化版本作为引导模型，且条件不变。这种引导模型可以通过简单地限制模型容量和/或训练时间来获得。我们在各种合成测试案例以及实际图像合成（类别条件和文本条件设置）中验证了自引导的有效性。此外，我们的方法使得无条件合成也能进行引导。在定量测试中，使用FID[10]和FDDINOv2[42]指标测量时，生成的图像分布得到了显著改善，在ImageNet-512和ImageNet-64生成中创下了新纪录。

items.en: We will make our implementation and pre-trained models publicly available.
items.zh: 我们将公开我们的实现和预训练模型。

items.en: Denoising diffusion generates samples from a distribution pdata​(𝐱)subscript𝑝data𝐱p_{\text{data}}(\mathbf{x}) by iteratively denoising a sample of pure white noise, such that a noise-free random data sample is gradually revealed [12]. The idea is to consider heat diffusion of pdata​(𝐱)subscript𝑝data𝐱p_{\text{data}}(\mathbf{x}) into a sequence of increasingly smoothed densities p​(𝐱;σ)=pdata​(𝐱)∗𝒩​(𝐱;𝟎,σ2​𝐈)𝑝𝐱𝜎∗subscript𝑝data𝐱𝒩𝐱0superscript𝜎2𝐈p(\mathbf{x};\sigma)=p_{\text{data}}(\mathbf{x})\ast\mathcal{N}(\mathbf{x};\mathbf{0},\sigma^{2}\mathbf{I}). For a large enough σmaxsubscript𝜎max\sigma_{\text{max}}, we have p​(𝐱;σmax)≈𝒩​(𝐱;𝟎,σmax2​𝐈)𝑝𝐱subscript𝜎max𝒩𝐱0superscriptsubscript𝜎max2𝐈p(\mathbf{x};\sigma_{\text{max}})\approx\mathcal{N}(\mathbf{x};\mathbf{0},\sigma_{\text{max}}^{2}\mathbf{I}), from which we can trivially sample by drawing normally distributed white noise. The resulting sample is then evolved backward towards low noise levels by a probability flow ODE [18, 38, 40]
items.zh: 去噪扩散通过迭代去噪纯白噪声样本，从分布p_data(x)中生成样本，使得逐渐揭示出无噪声的随机数据样本[12]。其思想是考虑p_data(x)的热扩散，形成一系列越来越平滑的密度p(x;σ)=p_data(x)∗N(x;0,σ^2 I)。对于足够大的σ_max，我们有p(x;σ_max)≈N(x;0,σ_max^2 I)，从中我们可以通过绘制正态分布的白噪声轻松采样。然后，通过概率流ODE[18, 38, 40]将得到的样本向低噪声水平反向演化，

items.en: that maintains the property 𝐱σ∼p​(𝐱σ;σ)similar-tosubscript𝐱𝜎𝑝subscript𝐱𝜎𝜎\mathbf{x}_{\sigma}\sim p(\mathbf{x}_{\sigma};\sigma\big{)} for every σ∈[0,σmax]𝜎0subscript𝜎max\sigma\in[0,\sigma_{\text{max}}]. Upon reaching σ=0𝜎0\sigma=0, we obtain 𝐱0∼p​(𝐱0;0)=pdata​(𝐱0)similar-tosubscript𝐱0𝑝subscript𝐱00subscript𝑝datasubscript𝐱0\mathbf{x}_{0}\sim p(\mathbf{x}_{0};0)=p_{\text{data}}(\mathbf{x}_{0}) as desired.
items.zh: 该ODE保持性质x_σ∼p(x_σ;σ)对于每个σ∈[0,σ_max]。当达到σ=0时，我们得到x_0∼p(x_0;0)=p_data(x_0)，如期望的那样。

items.en: In practice, the ODE is solved numerically by stepping along the trajectory defined by Equation 1. This requires evaluating the so-called score function [15] ∇𝐱log⁡p​(𝐱;σ)subscript∇𝐱𝑝𝐱𝜎\smash{\nabla_{\mathbf{x}}}\log p(\mathbf{x};\sigma) for a given sample 𝐱𝐱\mathbf{x} and noise level σ𝜎\sigma at each step. Rather surprisingly, we can approximate this vector using a neural network Dθ​(𝐱;σ)subscript𝐷𝜃𝐱𝜎D_{\theta}(\mathbf{x};\sigma) parameterized by weights θ𝜃\theta trained for the denoising task
items.zh: 在实践中，通过沿方程1定义的轨迹逐步求解ODE。这需要在每一步对给定样本x和噪声水平σ评估所谓的得分函数[15]∇_x log p(x;σ)。相当令人惊讶的是，我们可以使用一个由权重θ参数化的神经网络D_θ(x;σ)来近似这个向量，该网络针对去噪任务进行训练，

items.en: where ptrainsubscript𝑝trainp_{\text{train}} controls the noise level distribution during training. Given Dθsubscript𝐷𝜃D_{\theta}, we can estimate ∇𝐱log⁡p​(𝐱;σ)≈(Dθ​(𝐱;σ)−𝐱)/σ2subscript∇𝐱𝑝𝐱𝜎subscript𝐷𝜃𝐱𝜎𝐱superscript𝜎2\smash{\nabla_{\mathbf{x}}}\log p(\mathbf{x};\sigma)\approx(D_{\theta}(\mathbf{x};\sigma)-\mathbf{x})/\sigma^{2}, up to approximation errors due to, e.g., finite capacity or training time [18, 44]. As such, we are free to interpret the network as predicting either a denoised sample or a score vector, whichever is more convenient for the analysis at hand. Many reparameterizations and practical ODE solvers are possible, as enumerated by Karras et al. [18]. We follow their recommendations, including the schedule σ​(t)=t𝜎𝑡𝑡\sigma(t)=t that lets us parameterize the ODE directly via noise level σ𝜎\sigma instead of a separate time variable t𝑡t.
items.zh: 其中p_train控制训练期间的噪声水平分布。给定D_θ，我们可以估计∇_x log p(x;σ)≈(D_θ(x;σ)−x)/σ^2，由于有限容量或训练时间等导致的近似误差除外[18, 44]。因此，我们可以自由地将网络解释为预测去噪样本或得分向量，以方便分析为准。Karras等人[18]列举了许多重参数化和实际的ODE求解器。我们遵循他们的建议，包括调度σ(t)=t，这使我们能够直接通过噪声水平σ而不是单独的时间变量t来参数化ODE。

items.en: In most applications, each data sample 𝐱𝐱\mathbf{x} is associated with a label 𝐜𝐜\mathbf{c}, representing, e.g., a class index or a text prompt. At generation time, we control the outcome by choosing a label 𝐜𝐜\mathbf{c} and seeking a sample from the conditional distribution p​(𝐱|𝐜;σ)𝑝conditional𝐱𝐜𝜎p(\mathbf{x}|\mathbf{c};\sigma) with σ=0𝜎0\sigma=0. In practice, this is achieved by training a denoiser network Dθ​(𝐱;σ,𝐜)subscript𝐷𝜃𝐱𝜎𝐜D_{\theta}(\mathbf{x};\sigma,\mathbf{c}) that accepts 𝐜𝐜\mathbf{c} as an additional conditioning input.
items.zh: 在大多数应用中，每个数据样本x都与一个标签c相关联，例如类别索引或文本提示。在生成时，我们通过选择标签c并寻求从条件分布p(x|c;σ)中采样（σ=0）来控制结果。在实践中，这是通过训练一个接受c作为额外条件输入的去噪器网络D_θ(x;σ,c)来实现的。

items.en: For complex visual datasets, the generated images often fail to reproduce the clarity of the training images due to approximation errors made by finite-capacity networks. A broadly used trick called classifier-free guidance (CFG) [13] pushes the samples towards higher likelihood of the class label, sacrificing variety for “more canonical” images that the network appears to be better capable of handling.
items.zh: 对于复杂的视觉数据集，由于有限容量网络造成的近似误差，生成的图像通常无法再现训练图像的清晰度。一个广泛使用的技巧称为无分类器引导（CFG）[13]，它将样本推向类别标签的更高似然，牺牲多样性以换取网络似乎更能处理的“更规范”图像。

items.en: In a general setting, guidance in a diffusion model involves two denoiser networks D0​(𝐱;σ,𝐜)subscript𝐷0𝐱𝜎𝐜D_{0}(\mathbf{x};\sigma,\mathbf{c}) and D1​(𝐱;σ,𝐜)subscript𝐷1𝐱𝜎𝐜D_{1}(\mathbf{x};\sigma,\mathbf{c}). The guiding effect is achieved by extrapolating between the two denoising results by a factor w𝑤w:
items.zh: 在一般设置中，扩散模型中的引导涉及两个去噪器网络D_0(x;σ,c)和D_1(x;σ,c)。引导效果是通过因子w在两个去噪结果之间外推来实现的：

items.en: Trivially, setting w=0𝑤0w=0 or w=1𝑤1w=1 recovers the output of D0subscript𝐷0D_{0} and D1subscript𝐷1D_{1}, respectively, while choosing w>1𝑤1w>1 over-emphasizes the output of D1subscript𝐷1D_{1}. Recalling the equivalence of denoisers and scores [44], we can write
items.zh: 显然，设置w=0或w=1分别恢复D_0和D_1的输出，而选择w>1则过度强调D_1的输出。回顾去噪器和得分之间的等价性[44]，我们可以写出

items.en: Thus, guidance grants us access to the score of the density pw​(𝐱|𝐜;σ)subscript𝑝𝑤conditional𝐱𝐜𝜎p_{w}(\mathbf{x}|\mathbf{c};\sigma) implied in the parentheses. This score can be further written as [8, 13]
items.zh: 因此，引导使我们能够访问括号中隐含的密度p_w(x|c;σ)的得分。这个得分可以进一步写为[8, 13]

items.en: Substituting this expression into the ODE of Equation 1, this yields the standard evolution for generating images from p1subscript𝑝1p_{1}, plus a perturbation that increases (for w>1𝑤1w>1) the ratio of p1subscript𝑝1p_{1} and p0subscript𝑝0p_{0} as evaluated at the sample. The latter can be interpreted as increasing the likelihood that a hypothetical classifier would attribute for the sample having come from density p1subscript𝑝1p_{1} rather than p0subscript𝑝0p_{0}.
items.zh: 将这个表达式代入方程1的ODE中，这产生了从p_1生成图像的标准演化，加上一个扰动，该扰动（对于w>1）增加了在样本处评估的p_1与p_0的比率。后者可以解释为增加了一个假设分类器将样本归因于来自密度p_1而非p_0的似然。

items.en: In CFG, we train an auxiliary unconditional denoiser Dθ​(𝐱;σ)subscript𝐷𝜃𝐱𝜎D_{\theta}(\mathbf{x};\sigma) to denoise the distribution p​(𝐱;σ)𝑝𝐱𝜎p(\mathbf{x};\sigma) marginalized over 𝐜𝐜\mathbf{c}, and use this as D0subscript𝐷0D_{0}. In practice, this is typically [13] done using the same network Dθsubscript𝐷𝜃D_{\theta} with an empty conditioning label, setting D0≔Dθ​(𝐱;σ,∅)≔subscript𝐷0subscript𝐷𝜃𝐱𝜎D_{0}\coloneqq D_{\theta}(\mathbf{x};\sigma,\emptyset) and D1≔Dθ​(𝐱;σ,𝐜)≔subscript𝐷1subscript𝐷𝜃𝐱𝜎𝐜D_{1}\coloneqq D_{\theta}(\mathbf{x};\sigma,\mathbf{c}). By Bayes’ rule, the extrapolated score vector becomes ∇𝐱log⁡p​(𝐱|𝐜;σ)+(w−1)​∇𝐱log⁡p​(𝐜|𝐱;σ)subscript∇𝐱𝑝conditional𝐱𝐜𝜎𝑤1subscript∇𝐱𝑝conditional𝐜𝐱𝜎\smash{\nabla_{\mathbf{x}}}\log p(\mathbf{x}|\mathbf{c};\sigma)+(w-1)\smash{\nabla_{\mathbf{x}}}\log p(\mathbf{c}|\mathbf{x};\sigma). During sampling, this guides the image to more strongly align with the specified class 𝐜𝐜\mathbf{c}.
items.zh: 在CFG中，我们训练一个辅助的无条件去噪器D_θ(x;σ)来对在c上边缘化的分布p(x;σ)进行去噪，并将其用作D_0。在实践中，这通常[13]使用相同的网络D_θ，但带有空条件标签，设置D_0≔D_θ(x;σ,∅)和D_1≔D_θ(x;σ,c)。根据贝叶斯规则，外推的得分向量变为∇_x log p(x|c;σ)+(w−1)∇_x log p(c|x;σ)。在采样过程中，这引导图像更强烈地与指定的类别c对齐。

items.en: It would be tempting to conclude that solving the diffusion ODE with the score function of Equation 5 produces samples from the data distribution specified by pw​(𝐱|𝐜;0)subscript𝑝𝑤conditional𝐱𝐜0p_{w}(\mathbf{x}|\mathbf{c};0). Unfortunately this is not the case, because pw​(𝐱|𝐜;σ)subscript𝑝𝑤conditional𝐱𝐜𝜎p_{w}(\mathbf{x}|\mathbf{c};\sigma) does not represent a valid heat diffusion of pw​(𝐱|𝐜;0)subscript𝑝𝑤conditional𝐱𝐜0p_{w}(\mathbf{x}|\mathbf{c};0). Therefore, solving the ODE does not, in fact, follow the density. Instead, the samples are blindly pushed towards higher values of the implied density at each noise level during sampling. This can lead to distorted sampling trajectories, greatly exaggerated truncation, and mode dropping in the results [21], as well as over-saturation of colors [36]. Nonetheless, the improvement in image quality is often remarkable, and high guidance values are commonly used despite the drawbacks (e.g., [11, 31, 33, 36]).
items.zh: 人们可能会倾向于得出结论，使用方程5的得分函数求解扩散ODE会产生由p_w(x|c;0)指定的数据分布中的样本。不幸的是，情况并非如此，因为p_w(x|c;σ)并不表示p_w(x|c;0)的有效热扩散。因此，求解ODE实际上并不遵循密度。相反，样本在采样过程中被盲目地推向每个噪声水平下隐含密度的更高值。这可能导致扭曲的采样轨迹、极度夸大的截断和结果中的模式丢失[21]，以及颜色过饱和[36]。尽管如此，图像质量的改进通常是显著的，尽管存在缺点，高引导值仍被广泛使用（例如[11, 31, 33, 36]）。

full.sec: 3 Why does CFG improve image quality?
full.secZh: 3 为什么CFG能提升图像质量？

items.en: We begin by identifying the mechanism by which CFG improves image quality instead of only affecting prompt alignment. To illustrate why unguided diffusion models often produce unsatisfactory images, and how CFG remedies the problem, we study a 2D toy example where a small-scale denoiser network is trained to perform conditional diffusion in a synthetic dataset (Figure 1). The dataset is designed to exhibit low local dimensionality (i.e., highly anisotropic and narrow support) and hierarchical emergence of local detail upon noise removal. These are both properties that can be expected from the actual manifold of realistic images [4, 32]. For details of the setup, see Appendix C.
items.zh: 我们首先确定CFG改善图像质量（而不仅仅影响提示对齐）的机制。为了说明为什么无引导扩散模型经常产生不令人满意的图像，以及CFG如何解决这个问题，我们研究了一个二维玩具示例，其中一个小规模去噪器网络被训练在合成数据集上执行条件扩散（图1）。该数据集被设计为表现出低局部维度（即高度各向异性和狭窄支撑）以及在噪声去除时局部细节的层次涌现。这些都是可以从真实图像的实际流形中预期的属性[4, 32]。有关设置的详细信息，请参见附录C。

items.en: Compared to sampling directly from the underlying distribution (Figure 1(a)), the unguided diffusion in Figure 1(b) produces a large number of extremely unlikely samples outside the bulk of the distribution. In the image generation setting, these would correspond to unrealistic and broken images.
items.zh: 与直接从底层分布采样（图1(a)）相比，图1(b)中的无引导扩散在分布主体之外产生了大量极不可能的样本。在图像生成设置中，这些将对应于不真实和破损的图像。

items.en: We argue that the outliers stem from the limited capability of the score network combined with the score matching objective. It is well known that maximum likelihood (ML) estimation leads to a “conservative” fit of the data distribution [2] in the sense that the model attempts to cover all training samples. This is because the underlying Kullback–Leibler divergence incurs extreme penalties if the model severely underestimates the likelihood of any training sample. While score matching is generally not equal to ML estimation, they are closely related [12, 24, 40] and appear to exhibit broadly similar behavior. For example, it is known that for a multivariate Gaussian model, the optimal score matching fit coincides with the ML estimate [15]. Figures 2(a) and 2(b) show the learned score field and implied density in our toy example for two models of different capacity at an intermediate noise level. The stronger model envelops the data more tightly, while the weaker model’s density is more spread out.
items.zh: 我们认为，异常值源于得分网络与得分匹配目标相结合的能力有限。众所周知，最大似然（ML）估计会导致对数据分布的“保守”拟合[2]，即模型试图覆盖所有训练样本。这是因为如果模型严重低估任何训练样本的似然，潜在的Kullback–Leibler散度会施加极端惩罚。虽然得分匹配通常不等于ML估计，但它们密切相关[12, 24, 40]，并且表现出大致相似的行为。例如，已知对于多元高斯模型，最优得分匹配拟合与ML估计一致[15]。图2(a)和2(b)展示了在我们的玩具示例中，两种不同容量模型在中等噪声水平下学习到的得分场和隐含密度。较强模型更紧密地包裹数据，而较弱模型的密度则更分散。

items.en: From the perspective of image generation, a tendency to cover the entire training data becomes a problem: The model ends up producing strange and unlikely images from the data distribution’s extremities that are not learnt accurately but included just to avoid the high loss penalties. Furthermore, during training, the network has only seen real noisy images as inputs, and during sampling it may not be prepared to deal with the unlikely samples it is handed down from the higher noise levels.
items.zh: 从图像生成的角度来看，覆盖整个训练数据的倾向会成为一个问题：模型最终会生成来自数据分布极端区域的奇怪且不太可能的图像，这些区域没有被准确学习，但为了避免高损失惩罚而被包含进来。此外，在训练期间，网络只见过真实的噪声图像作为输入，而在采样期间，它可能没有准备好处理从更高噪声水平传递下来的不太可能的样本。

items.en: The effect of applying classifier-free guidance during generation is demonstrated in Figure 1(c). As expected, the samples avoid the class boundary (i.e., there are no samples in the vicinity of the gray area), and entire branches of the distribution are dropped. We also observe a second phenomenon, where the samples have been pulled in towards the core of the manifold, and away from the low-probability intermediate regions. Seeing that this eliminates the unlikely outlier samples, we attribute the image quality improvement to it. However, mere boosting of the class likelihood does not explain this increased concentration.
items.zh: 在生成过程中应用无分类器引导的效果如图1(c)所示。正如预期，样本避开了类别边界（即灰色区域附近没有样本），并且分布的整个分支被丢弃。我们还观察到第二个现象，即样本被拉向流形的核心，远离低概率的中间区域。由于这消除了不太可能的异常样本，我们将图像质量的提升归因于此。然而，仅仅提升类别似然并不能解释这种增加的集中性。

items.en: We argue that this phenomenon stems from a quality difference between the conditional and unconditional denoiser networks. The denoiser D0subscript𝐷0D_{0} faces a more difficult task of the two: It has to generate from all classes at once, whereas D1subscript𝐷1D_{1} can focus on a single class for any specific sample. Given the more difficult task, and typically only a small slice of the training budget, the network D0subscript𝐷0D_{0} attains a worse fit to the data.111The visual quality difference is obvious if we simply inspect the unconditional images generated by current large-scale models. Furthermore, the unconditional case tends to work so poorly that the corresponding quantitative numbers are hardly ever reported. The EDM2-S model [19] trained with ImageNet-512, for example, yields a FID of 2.56 in the class-conditional setting and 11.67 in the unconditional setting. This difference in accuracy is apparent in respective plots of the learned densities in Figures 2(a) and 2(b).
items.zh: 我们认为，这种现象源于条件去噪网络和无条件去噪网络之间的质量差异。去噪器 D0 面临更困难的任务：它必须同时从所有类别生成，而 D1 可以针对任何特定样本专注于单个类别。鉴于更困难的任务，并且通常只有一小部分训练预算，网络 D0 对数据的拟合较差。¹ 视觉质量差异显而易见，只需检查当前大规模模型生成的无条件图像即可。此外，无条件情况通常效果很差，以至于相应的量化指标几乎从未被报告。例如，使用ImageNet-512训练的EDM2-S模型[19]在类别条件设置下FID为2.56，在无条件设置下为11.67。这种精度差异在图2(a)和2(b)的学习密度图中显而易见。

items.en: From our interpretation in Section 2, it follows that CFG is not only boosting the likelihood of the sample having come from the class 𝐜𝐜\mathbf{c}, but also that of having come from the higher-quality implied distribution. Recall that guidance boils down to an additional force (Equation 5) that pulls the samples towards higher values of log⁡[p1​(𝐱|𝐜;σ)/p0​(𝐱|𝐜;σ)]subscript𝑝1conditional𝐱𝐜𝜎subscript𝑝0conditional𝐱𝐜𝜎\log\left[p_{1}(\mathbf{x}|\mathbf{c};\sigma)/p_{0}(\mathbf{x}|\mathbf{c};\sigma)\right]. Plotting this ratio for our toy example in Figure 2(c), along with corresponding gradients that guidance contributes to the ODE vector field, we see that the ratio generally decreases with distance from the manifold due to the denominator p0subscript𝑝0p_{0} representing a more spread-out distribution, and hence falling off slower than the numerator p1subscript𝑝1p_{1}. Consequently, the gradients point inward towards the data manifold. Each contour of the density ratio corresponds to a specific likelihood that a hypothetical classifier would assign on a sample being drawn from p1subscript𝑝1p_{1} instead of p0subscript𝑝0p_{0}. Because the contours roughly follow the local orientation and branching of the data manifold, pushing samples deeper into the “good side” concentrates them at the manifold.222 Discriminator guidance [20] trains an explicit classifier to discriminate between the generated samples and noisy training samples at each noise level and uses its log-gradient to guide the sampling. Our analysis is not applicable in this situation; in CFG the task is implicit and the distinction is between p1subscript𝑝1p_{1} and p0subscript𝑝0p_{0}.
items.zh: 根据我们在第2节中的解释，CFG不仅提升了样本来自类别 𝐜 的似然，还提升了样本来自更高质量隐含分布的似然。回想一下，引导归结为一个额外的力（公式5），将样本拉向 log[p1(𝐱|𝐜;σ)/p0(𝐱|𝐜;σ)] 的更高值。在图2(c)中绘制了我们的玩具示例中的这个比率，以及引导贡献给ODE向量场的相应梯度，我们看到该比率通常随着与流形距离的增加而减小，因为分母 p0 代表更分散的分布，因此下降得比分子 p1 慢。因此，梯度指向数据流形内部。密度比率的每个等高线对应于假设的分类器将样本分配给 p1 而非 p0 的特定似然。由于等高线大致遵循数据流形的局部方向和分支，将样本推入“好的一侧”更深会使它们集中在流形上。² 判别器引导[20]训练一个显式分类器来区分每个噪声水平下的生成样本和噪声训练样本，并使用其对数梯度来指导采样。我们的分析不适用于这种情况；在CFG中，任务是隐式的，区别在于 p1 和 p0。

items.en: We can expect the two models to suffer from inability to fit at similar places, but to a different degree. The predictions of the denoisers will disagree more decisively in these regions. As such, CFG can be seen as a form of adaptive truncation that identifies when a sample is likely to be under-fit and pushes it towards the general direction of better samples. Figures 2(d) and 2(e) show the effect over the course of generation: The truncation “overshoots” the correction and produces a narrower distribution than the ground truth, but in practice this does not appear to have an adverse effect on the images.
items.zh: 我们可以预期这两个模型在相似的位置会遭受拟合能力不足的问题，但程度不同。去噪器的预测在这些区域会有更明显的分歧。因此，CFG可以被视为一种自适应截断形式，它识别出样本可能欠拟合的情况，并将其推向更好样本的大致方向。图2(d)和2(e)显示了生成过程中的效果：截断“过度”校正并产生了比真实分布更窄的分布，但在实践中这似乎对图像没有不利影响。

items.en: In contrast, a naive attempt at achieving this kind of truncation — inspired by, e.g., the truncation trick in GANs [3, 25] or lowering temperature in generative language models — would counteract the smoothing by uniformly lengthening the score vectors by a factor w>1𝑤1w>1. This is illustrated in Figure 1(d), where the samples are indeed concentrated in high-probability regions, but in an isotropic fashion that leaves the outer branches empty. In practice, images generated this way tend to show reduced variation, oversimplified details, and monotone texture.
items.zh: 相比之下，实现这种截断的朴素尝试——例如，受GANs中的截断技巧[3, 25]或生成语言模型中降低温度的启发——会通过均匀地将得分向量乘以因子 w>1 来抵消平滑。如图1(d)所示，样本确实集中在高概率区域，但以各向同性的方式，使得外部分支为空。在实践中，以这种方式生成的图像往往表现出减少的变化、过度简化的细节和单调的纹理。

items.en: We propose to isolate the image quality improvement effect by directly guiding a high-quality model D1subscript𝐷1D_{1} with a poor model D0subscript𝐷0D_{0} trained on the same task, conditioning, and data distribution, but suffering from certain additional degradations, such as low capacity and/or under-training. We call this procedure autoguidance, as the model is guided with an inferior version of itself.
items.zh: 我们提出通过直接用高质量模型 D1 引导一个在相同任务、条件和数据分布上训练但遭受某些额外退化（如低容量和/或欠训练）的较差模型 D0，来隔离图像质量提升效果。我们将此过程称为自动引导，因为模型是用其自身的劣化版本引导的。

items.en: In the context of our 2D toy example, this turns out to work surprisingly well. Figure 1(e) demonstrates the effect of using a smaller D0subscript𝐷0D_{0} with fewer training iterations. As desired, the samples are pulled close to the distribution without systematically dropping any part of it.
items.zh: 在我们的2D玩具示例中，这出奇地有效。图1(e)展示了使用训练迭代次数更少的较小 D0 的效果。如预期，样本被拉近分布，而不会系统地丢弃任何部分。

items.en: To analyze why this technique works, recall that under limited model capacity, score matching tends to over-emphasize low-probability (i.e., implausible and under-trained) regions of the data distribution. Exactly where and how the problems appear depend on various factors such as network architecture, dataset, training details, etc., and we cannot expect to identify and characterize the specific issues a priori. However, we can expect a weaker version of the same model to make broadly similar errors in the same regions, only stronger. Autoguidance seeks to identify and reduce the errors made by the stronger model by measuring its difference to the weaker model’s prediction, and boosting it. When the two models agree, the perturbation is insignificant, but when they disagree, the difference indicates the general direction towards better samples.
items.zh: 为了分析为什么这种技术有效，回想一下，在有限模型容量下，得分匹配倾向于过度强调数据分布的低概率（即不太可能和欠训练）区域。问题出现的确切位置和方式取决于各种因素，如网络架构、数据集、训练细节等，我们无法期望先验地识别和描述具体问题。然而，我们可以预期同一模型的较弱版本会在相同区域做出大致相似的错误，只是程度更强。自动引导旨在通过测量较强模型与较弱模型预测的差异并增强它，来识别和减少较强模型所犯的错误。当两个模型一致时，扰动微不足道，但当它们不一致时，差异指示了朝向更好样本的大致方向。

items.en: As such, we can expect autoguidance to work if the two models suffer from degradations that are compatible with each other. Since any D1subscript𝐷1D_{1} can be expected to suffer from, e.g., lack of capacity and lack of training — at least to some degree — it makes sense to choose D0subscript𝐷0D_{0} so that it further exacerbates these aspects.
items.zh: 因此，如果两个模型遭受彼此兼容的退化，我们可以预期自动引导能够发挥作用。由于任何 D1 都可以预期遭受例如容量不足和训练不足——至少在一定程度上——因此选择 D0 以进一步加剧这些方面是有意义的。

items.en: In practice, models that are trained separately or for a different number of iterations differ not only in accuracy of fit, but also in terms of random initialization, shuffling of the training data, etc. For guidance to be successful, the quality gap should be large enough to make the systematic spreading-out of the density outweigh these random effects.
items.zh: 在实践中，单独训练或迭代次数不同的模型不仅在拟合精度上存在差异，而且在随机初始化、训练数据打乱等方面也有所不同。要使引导成功，质量差距应足够大，以使密度的系统性扩散超过这些随机效应。

items.en: To validate our hypothesis that the two models must suffer from the same kind of degradations, we perform a controlled experiment using synthetic corruptions applied to a well-trained real-world image diffusion model. We create the main and guiding networks, D1subscript𝐷1D_{1} and D0subscript𝐷0D_{0}, by applying different degrees of a synthetic corruption to the base model. This construction allows us to use the untouched base model as grounding when measuring the FID effect of the various combinations of corruptions applied to D1subscript𝐷1D_{1} and D0subscript𝐷0D_{0}. We find that as long as the degradations are compatible, autoguidance largely undoes the damage caused by the corruptions:
items.zh: 为了验证我们的假设，即两个模型必须遭受相同类型的退化，我们使用应用于训练良好的真实世界图像扩散模型的合成损坏进行了一项受控实验。我们通过对基础模型应用不同程度的合成损坏来创建主网络和引导网络 D1 和 D0。这种构造使我们能够使用未触及的基础模型作为基准，测量应用于 D1 和 D0 的各种损坏组合的 FID 效果。我们发现，只要退化是兼容的，自动引导在很大程度上可以消除损坏造成的影响：

items.en: Base model: As the base model, we use EDM2-S trained on ImageNet-512 without dropout (FID = 2.56).
items.zh: 基础模型：我们使用在 ImageNet-512 上训练且无 dropout 的 EDM2-S（FID = 2.56）。

items.en: Dropout: We construct D1subscript𝐷1D_{1} by applying 5% dropout to the base model in a post-hoc fashion (FID = 4.98), and D0subscript𝐷0D_{0} by applying 10% dropout to the base model (FID = 15.00). Applying autoguidance, we reach the best result (FID = 2.55) with w=2.25𝑤2.25w=2.25, matching the base model’s FID.
items.zh: Dropout：我们通过对基础模型事后应用 5% 的 dropout 来构造 D1（FID = 4.98），并通过应用 10% 的 dropout 来构造 D0（FID = 15.00）。应用自动引导，我们在 w=2.25 时达到最佳结果（FID = 2.55），与基础模型的 FID 相匹配。

items.en: Input noise: We construct D1subscript𝐷1D_{1} by modifying the base model to add noise to the input images so that their noise level is increased by 10% (FID = 3.96). The σ𝜎\sigma conditioning input of the denoiser is adjusted accordingly. The guiding model D0subscript𝐷0D_{0} is constructed similarly, but with a noise level increase of 20% (FID = 9.73). Applying autoguidance, we reach the best result (FID = 2.56) with w=2.00𝑤2.00w=2.00, again matching the base model’s FID.
items.zh: 输入噪声：我们通过修改基础模型向输入图像添加噪声，使其噪声水平增加 10% 来构造 D1（FID = 3.96）。去噪器的 σ 条件输入相应调整。引导模型 D0 类似构造，但噪声水平增加 20%（FID = 9.73）。应用自动引导，我们在 w=2.00 时达到最佳结果（FID = 2.56），再次与基础模型的 FID 相匹配。

items.en: Mismatched degradations: If we corrupt D1subscript𝐷1D_{1} by dropout and D0subscript𝐷0D_{0} by input noise, or vice versa, guidance does not improve the results at all; in these cases, the best FID is obtained by setting w=1𝑤1w=1, i.e., by disabling guidance and using the less corrupted D1subscript𝐷1D_{1} exclusively.
items.zh: 不匹配的退化：如果我们通过 dropout 损坏 D1，通过输入噪声损坏 D0，反之亦然，引导根本不会改善结果；在这些情况下，最佳 FID 是通过设置 w=1 获得的，即禁用引导并仅使用损坏较少的 D1。

items.en: While this experiment corroborates our main hypothesis, we do not suggest that guiding with these synthetic degradations would be useful in practice. A realistic diffusion model will not suffer from these particular degradations, so creating a guiding model by introducing them would not yield consistent truncation towards the data manifold.
items.zh: 虽然这个实验证实了我们的主要假设，但我们并不建议在实践中使用这些合成损坏进行引导。一个真实的扩散模型不会遭受这些特定的退化，因此通过引入它们来创建引导模型不会产生对数据流形的一致截断。

items.en: Our primary evaluation is carried out using ImageNet (ILSVRC2012) [6] at two resolutions: 512×512512512512{\times}512 and 64×64646464{\times}64. For ImageNet-512 we use latent diffusion [34], while ImageNet-64 works directly on RGB pixels. We take the current state-of-the-art diffusion model EDM2 [19] as our baseline.333https://github.com/NVlabs/edm2 We use the EDM2-S and EDM2-XXL models with default sampling parameters: 32 deterministic steps with a 2ndsuperscript2nd2^{\text{nd}} order Heun sampler [18]. For most setups, a pre-trained model is publicly available, and in the remaining cases we train the models ourselves using the official implementation (Appendix B).
items.zh: 我们的主要评估使用 ImageNet（ILSVRC2012）[6] 在两种分辨率下进行：512×512 和 64×64。对于 ImageNet-512，我们使用潜在扩散 [34]，而 ImageNet-64 直接在 RGB 像素上工作。我们以当前最先进的扩散模型 EDM2 [19] 作为基线。我们使用 EDM2-S 和 EDM2-XXL 模型，默认采样参数：32 个确定性步骤，使用二阶 Heun 采样器 [18]。对于大多数设置，预训练模型是公开可用的，在其余情况下，我们使用官方实现自行训练模型（附录 B）。

items.en: We use two degradations for the guiding model: shorter training time and reduced capacity compared to the main model. We obtain the best results by having both of these enabled. With EDM2-S, for example, we use an XS-sized guiding model that receives 1/161161/16th of the training iterations of the main model. We ablate the relative importance of the degradations as well as the sensitivity to these specific choices in Section 5.1. As the EDM2 networks are known to be sensitive to the guidance weight and EMA length [19], we search the optimal values for each case using a grid search.
items.zh: 我们对引导模型使用两种退化：与主模型相比，训练时间更短和容量减少。我们通过同时启用这两者获得最佳结果。例如，对于 EDM2-S，我们使用一个 XS 大小的引导模型，其训练迭代次数为主模型的 1/16。我们在第 5.1 节中消融了退化的相对重要性以及对这些特定选择的敏感性。由于已知 EDM2 网络对引导权重和 EMA 长度敏感 [19]，我们通过网格搜索为每种情况搜索最优值。

items.en: A particular strength of autoguidance is that it can be applied to unconditional models as well. While conditional ImageNet generation may be getting close to saturation, the unconditional results remain surprisingly poor. EDM2-S achieves a FID of 11.67 in the unconditional setting, indicating that practically none of the generated images are of presentable quality. Enabling autoguidance lowers the FID substantially to 3.86, and the improvement in FDDINOv2 is similarly significant.
items.zh: 自动引导的一个特别优势是它也可以应用于无条件模型。虽然条件 ImageNet 生成可能接近饱和，但无条件结果仍然出奇地差。EDM2-S 在无条件设置下实现了 11.67 的 FID，表明生成的图像几乎没有可展示的质量。启用自动引导将 FID 大幅降低至 3.86，FDDINOv2 的改进同样显著。

items.en: We also explored several other degradations for the guiding model but did not find them to be beneficial. First, we tried reducing the amount of training data used for the guiding model, but this did not seem to improve the results over the baseline. Second, applying guidance interval [21] on top of our method reduced its benefits to some extent, suggesting that autoguidance is helpful at all noise levels. Third, deriving the guiding model from the main model using synthetic degradations did not work at all, providing further evidence that the guiding model needs to exhibit the same kinds of degradations that the main model suffers from. Fourth, we found that if the main model had been quantized, e.g., to improve inference speed, quantizing it to an even lower precision did not yield a useful guiding model.
items.zh: 我们还探索了引导模型的其他几种退化，但发现它们没有益处。首先，我们尝试减少引导模型使用的训练数据量，但这似乎没有改善基线结果。其次，在我们的方法之上应用引导间隔 [21] 在一定程度上降低了其益处，表明自动引导在所有噪声水平下都有帮助。第三，使用合成损坏从主模型派生引导模型完全不起作用，进一步证明引导模型需要表现出与主模型遭受的相同类型的退化。第四，我们发现如果主模型已被量化（例如，为了提高推理速度），将其量化到更低精度并不能产生有用的引导模型。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Example results for the Tree frog, Palace, Mushroom, Castle classes of ImageNet-512 using EDM2-S. Guidance weight increases to the right; rows are classifier-free guidance and our method.
items.capZh: 图 3：使用 EDM2-S 的 ImageNet-512 的树蛙、宫殿、蘑菇、城堡类别的示例结果。引导权重向右增加；行分别是无分类器引导和我们的方法。

items.en: In order to study our method in the context of large-scale image generators, we apply it to DeepFloyd IF [41]. We choose this baseline because multiple differently-sized models are publicly available. Ideally we could have also used an earlier snapshot as the guiding model, but those were not available. DeepFloyd IF generates images as a cascade of three diffusion models: a base model and two super-resolution stages. We apply our method to the base model only, while the subsequent stages always use CFG. Figure 4 demonstrates the effect of CFG, our method, and their various combinations. To combine autoguidance with CFG, we extend Equation 3 to cover multiple guiding models as proposed by Liu et al. [23] and distribute the total guidance weight among them using linear interpolation (see Appendix B.2 for details). While CFG improves the image quality significantly, it also simplifies the style and layout of the image towards a canonical depiction. Our method similarly improves the image quality, but it better preserves the image’s style and visual complexity. We hope that using both guiding methods simultaneously will serve as a new, useful artistic control.
items.zh: 为了在大规模图像生成器的背景下研究我们的方法，我们将其应用于 DeepFloyd IF [41]。我们选择这个基线是因为多个不同大小的模型是公开可用的。理想情况下，我们也可以使用较早的快照作为引导模型，但这些快照不可用。DeepFloyd IF 通过三个扩散模型的级联生成图像：一个基础模型和两个超分辨率阶段。我们仅将我们的方法应用于基础模型，而后续阶段始终使用 CFG。图 4 展示了 CFG、我们的方法及其各种组合的效果。为了将自动引导与 CFG 结合，我们将方程 3 扩展为覆盖多个引导模型，如 Liu 等人 [23] 所提出的，并使用线性插值在它们之间分配总引导权重（详见附录 B.2）。虽然 CFG 显著提高了图像质量，但它也将图像的风格和布局简化为规范化的描绘。我们的方法同样提高了图像质量，但更好地保留了图像的风格和视觉复杂性。我们希望同时使用这两种引导方法将作为一种新的、有用的艺术控制手段。

items.capEn: Figure 4: Results for DeepFloyd IF [41] using the prompt “A blue jay standing on a large basket of rainbow macarons”. The rows correspond to guidance weights w∈{1,2,3,4}𝑤1234w\in\{1,2,3,4\}. The leftmost column shows results for CFG and the rightmost for autoguidance (XL-sized model guided by M-sized one). The middle columns correspond to blending between the two. See Appendix A for more examples.
items.capZh: 图 4：使用提示“一只蓝松鸦站在一大篮彩虹马卡龙上”的 DeepFloyd IF [41] 结果。行对应引导权重 w∈{1,2,3,4}。最左列显示 CFG 的结果，最右列显示自动引导的结果（XL 大小模型由 M 大小模型引导）。中间列对应两者之间的混合。更多示例见附录 A。

items.en: We have shown that classifier-free guidance entangles several phenomena together, and that a different perspective together with simple practical changes opens up an entire new design space. In addition to removing the superfluous connection to conditioning, this enables significantly better results.
items.zh: 我们已经表明，无分类器引导将几种现象纠缠在一起，而不同的视角加上简单的实际变化开辟了一个全新的设计空间。除了消除与条件化的多余联系外，这还实现了显著更好的结果。

items.en: Potential directions for future work include formally proving the conditions that allow autoguidance to be beneficial, and deriving good rules of thumb for selecting the best guiding model. Our suggestion — an early snapshot of a smaller model — is easy to satisfy in principle, but these are not available for current large-scale image generators in practice. Such generators are also often trained in successive stages where the training data may change at some point, causing potential distribution shifts between snapshots that would violate our assumptions.
items.zh: 未来工作的潜在方向包括正式证明自动引导有益的条件，以及推导选择最佳引导模型的经验法则。我们的建议——较小模型的早期快照——原则上容易满足，但对于当前的大规模图像生成器来说，这些快照在实践中并不可用。此类生成器通常也在连续阶段中训练，其中训练数据可能在某个点发生变化，导致快照之间出现潜在的分布偏移，这将违反我们的假设。

items.en: We thank David Luebke, Janne Hellsten, Ming-Yu Liu, and Alex Keller for discussions and comments, and Tero Kuosmanen and Samuel Klenberg for maintaining our compute infrastructure.
items.zh: 我们感谢 David Luebke、Janne Hellsten、Ming-Yu Liu 和 Alex Keller 的讨论和评论，以及 Tero Kuosmanen 和 Samuel Klenberg 维护我们的计算基础设施。
